message:
chore(deps): bump asupersync 0.3.0 → 0.3.1 (crates.io)

Pulls asupersync forward to the 0.3.1 patch release.
- Cargo.toml: asupersync dep specs bumped.
- Cargo.lock (where tracked): refreshed via cargo update.

files.patch:
@@ -9,7 +9,7 @@ name = "fixture_capture"
 path = "src/main.rs"
 
 [dependencies]
-asupersync = { version = "0.3.0", features = ["test-internals"] }
+asupersync = { version = "0.3.1", features = ["test-internals"] }
 serde_json = "1"
 serde_yaml = "0.9"
 sha2 = "0.10"
